toolArgs.old_str:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Only run prettier when a file was created or edited.
if [[ "$TOOL_NAME" == "create" || "$TOOL_NAME" == "edit" ]]; then
  npx prettier --write .
fi
toolArgs.new_str:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Only run prettier when a file was created or edited.
# The hook receives context as JSON on stdin; extract toolName with jq.
INPUT=$(cat)
TOOL_NAME=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.toolName')

if [[ "$TOOL_NAME" == "create" || "$TOOL_NAME" == "edit" ]]; then
  npx prettier --write .
fi
